headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Is Betting On Advanced Packaging For 50% Growth In 2026
summary: Lam Research is highlighting its advanced packaging business as a key growth driver, with the company projecting revenues from this segment to rise more than 50% in 2026. The push is linked to demand for AI chips, high bandwidth memory and chiplet architectures, areas that require more complex packaging solutions. Competition is intensifying, with rivals such as Applied Materials and KLA Corporation also targeting advanced packaging opportunities. Lam Research, traded as NasdaqGS:LRCX, is...

headline: How Much Upside Can LRCX Stock's Growth Deliver?
summary: At $388.92, Lam Research (LRCX) looks set up for roughly 51% of upside over the next three years under a conservative scenario. That is a move large enough to justify digging into where it comes from. Revenue compounding does the work, but the multiple takes a meaningful cut along the way. Here is the operational reality the math is built on.
